$orderKey..validate: newData.hasChildren(['orderNumber', 'customer', 'items', 'subtotal', 'deliveryFee', 'discount', 'total', 'method', 'payment', 'status', 'createdAt', 'timestamp']) && newData.child('orderNumber').isString() && newData.child('customer').hasChildren(['name', 'phone']) && newData.child('customer/name').isString() && newData.child('customer/phone').isString() && newData.child('items').exists() && newData.child('subtotal').isNumber() && newData.child('deliveryFee').isNumber() && newData.child('discount').isNumber() && newData.child('total').isNumber() && (newData.child('method').val() === 'delivery' || newData.child('method').val() === 'pickup') && (newData.child('payment').val() === 'cash' || newData.child('payment').val() === 'vodafone') && (newData.child('status').val() === 'new' || newData.child('status').val() === 'preparing' || newData.child('status').val() === 'out_for_delivery' || newData.child('status').val() === 'delivered' || newData.child('status').val() === 'cancelled')
